main_heading.title: Cities / Sheykhats / Villages
main_heading.subtitle: Manage all cities, sheykhats, and villages within the governorates

table_heading.title: Manage Cities, Sheykhats, and Villages
table_heading.subtitle: Use the table and filters to view, edit, and manage cities, sheykhats, and villages

add_city.title: Add New City / Sheykhat / Village
add_city.description: Create a new residential unit and link it to the appropriate governorate and police station.

total.label: Total Units
total.subtext: Total number of all cities, sheykhats, and villages in the system

acceptable.label: Acceptable Units
acceptable.subtext: Areas from which the system accepts students

not_acceptable.label: Not Acceptable
not_acceptable.subtext: Areas from which the system does not accept students

delete.title: Confirm Deletion
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this residential unit? This action cannot be undone.

add.title: Add New Residential Unit
add.description: Create a new residential unit and link it to the appropriate governorate and police station.

view.title: View Residential Unit Details
view.description: Here you can view all details of the residential unit.

edit.title: Edit Residential Unit
edit.description: Edit the details and information of the city, sheykhat, or village.
